sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74343" key="o)cupaiderw/tinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-παιδερώτινος</orth>, in Lat. form <sense id="n74343.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oxypaederotinus, bright pink, Hist.Aug.Aurelian.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0023.tlg001.perseus-grc1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
